languages.text: "Если их долг быть зазнавшимся украшением флагмана, то кто я такой, чтобы им мешать. Раз тут принято их слушаться, мы постараемся обходить блюстителей стороной".
"If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."
languages.original_text: "Если их долг быть зазнавшимся украшением флагмана, то кто я такой, чтобы им мешать. Раз тут принято их слушаться, мы постараемся обходить блюстителей стороной".

traits.locale_text: "If their duty is to serve as the flagship's conceited trophies, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."
"If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."
"It's their duty, is it? Seems like a surefire way to go mad to me. With vigilance like that, they'd suspect their own mothers, wouldn't they? That tells me all I need to know."
"If their duty is to serve as the flagship's conceited trophies, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."
"If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."

languages.text: 「それは彼らの義務なのですか？私には、狂ってしまう確実な方法のように思えます。そんな警戒心があれば、自分の母親さえ疑ってしまうでしょう。これで、私はすべてを理解しました」
languages.original_text: "It's their duty, is it? Seems like a surefire way to go mad to me. With vigilance like that, they'd suspect their own mothers, wouldn't they? That tells me all I need to know."

languages.text: "Görevleri sancak gemisinin kibirli vitrin mankenleri olarak hizmet etmekse onların yoluna çıkmak bana mı düşer? Madem buradaki âdet onlara itaat etmek, infazcılardan uzak durmak için elimizden geleni yapacağız."
languages.original_text: "If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."

traits.locale_text: "Görevleri sancak gemisinin kibirli vitrin mankenleri olarak hizmet etmekse onların yoluna çıkmak bana mı düşer? Madem buradaki âdet onlara itaat etmek, infazcılardan uzak durmak için elimizden geleni yapacağız."

languages.text: “如果他们的职责就是充当这艘旗舰上不可一世的摆设，那我也没资格妨碍他们。既然这里的规矩就是服从他们，那我们会尽量避开这些执法者。”
languages.original_text: "If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."

traits.locale_text: “如果他们的职责就是充当这艘旗舰上不可一世的摆设，那我也没资格妨碍他们。既然这里的规矩就是服从他们，那我们会尽量避开这些执法者。”

languages.text: "Wenn es ihr Pflicht ist, als hochmütige Galionsfiguren des Flaggschiffs zu dienen, wer bin ich dann, ihnen in die Quere zu kommen? Nachdem es hier Sitte ist, ihnen zu gehorchen, halten wir uns von den Enforcern so gut es geht fern."
languages.original_text: "If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn es ihr Pflicht ist, als hochmütige Galionsfiguren des Flaggschiffs zu dienen, wer bin ich dann, ihnen in die Quere zu kommen? Nachdem es hier Sitte ist, ihnen zu gehorchen, halten wir uns von den Enforcern so gut es geht fern."

languages.text: « Si leur devoir consiste à servir de figures de proue arrogantes, qu'ils s'exécutent donc. Puisqu'ici, il est coutume d'obéir aux prévôts, nous ferons de notre mieux pour garder nos distances. »
languages.original_text: "If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."

traits.locale_text: « Si leur devoir consiste à servir de figures de proue arrogantes, qu'ils s'exécutent donc. Puisqu'ici, il est coutume d'obéir aux prévôts, nous ferons de notre mieux pour garder nos distances. »

languages.text: «Si su deber es servir como representantes arrogantes de la nave insignia, ¿quién soy yo para interponerme? Ya que aquí la costumbre es obedecerlos, haremos lo que podamos para mantener las distancias con los guardias».
languages.original_text: "If their duty is to serve as the flagship's arrogant figureheads, then who am I to get in their way? Since the custom here is to obey them, we'll do our best to steer clear of the enforcers."

traits.locale_text: «Si su deber es servir como representantes arrogantes de la nave insignia, ¿quién soy yo para interponerme? Ya que aquí la costumbre es obedecerlos, haremos lo que podamos para mantener las distancias con los guardias».
